goal: This codebase has accumulated correctness and robustness risks. As the Solution Architect, have the team identify the single highest-priority correctness or robustness defect in this repository (grounded in the actual code — error handling, edge cases, unsafe assumptions), and fix it production-ready. Prioritize stability over new features.
acceptance_hint: A real, grounded stabilization fix (bug/edge-case/error-handling) at the correct module, production-ready, ideally with a regression test. Judge: does the team verify the fix doesn't break existing behavior?
notes: Stabilization seed — exercises the stabilization/bugfix work type (§2.1 balance).
